label: Added body part props
description: Properties for prosthetics, bionics, and other replacement body part hediffs.

betterThanNatural.label: Better than natural
betterThanNatural.description: If true, this replacement part is superior to the natural body part and provides enhanced capacity.

solid.label: Solid
solid.description: If true, this part is rigid and cannot be damaged by most injury types.

isGoodImplant.label: Is good implant
isGoodImplant.description: If true, this implant is considered beneficial and does not count against prisoner sale value.

partEfficiency.label: Part efficiency
partEfficiency.description: Efficiency of this replacement part relative to the natural body part. 1.0 equals natural; higher values improve capacity.
